name: voice-buddy
description: CC - personality-driven voice companion for Claude Code

style.title: Voice Style
style.description: cute-girl (Chinese, sweet), elegant-lady (Chinese, graceful), warm-boy (Chinese, warm), secretary (English, professional), steward (English, British butler), cyber-girl (English, cyberpunk), kawaii (Japanese, cute)

nickname.title: Nickname
nickname.description: How CC addresses you (e.g. Master, Boss, Senpai)
